name: FULL DEMO READY — Complete Vertical Slice
description: Every single step to get the Sworder:721 demo playable. AnimBP wiring, montage fixes, root motion, asset registration, enemy AI, HUD, PIE verification. ONE plan, ZERO gaps.

steps.description: Open ABP_SW_MasterTemplate — verify parent class is SWAnimInstance
steps.detailed_instructions: Open ABP_SW_MasterTemplate from Content Browser at /Game/Variant_Combat/Anims/. Click Class Settings in toolbar. Verify Parent Class = SWAnimInstance (NOT UAnimInstance). If wrong, change it. This is CRITICAL for NativePostEvaluateAnimation to work.

steps.description: Verify AnimGraph chain: Locomotion SM -> DefaultSlot -> Output Pose
steps.detailed_instructions: In AnimGraph tab, verify three nodes connected left to right: Locomotion State Machine output -> Slot node (DefaultGroup.DefaultSlot) -> Output Pose. If chain is broken, reconnect by dragging pose pins.
steps.verification: Chain connected with white lines between all three nodes

steps.description: Enter Locomotion SM — verify IdleWalkRun state with BlendSpace
steps.detailed_instructions: Double-click Locomotion node. Verify Entry arrow connects to IdleWalkRun state. Double-click IdleWalkRun. Verify Blend Space Player is set to BS_Trooper_WalkRun or BS_Strafe_WalkRun_RT with Speed and Direction variables connected. Go back to AnimGraph breadcrumb.
steps.verification: IdleWalkRun has working BlendSpace with Speed and Direction

steps.description: Set Root Motion Mode on AnimBP
steps.detailed_instructions: In ABP_SW_MasterTemplate, click Class Settings. In Details search for Root Motion Mode. Set to No Root Motion Extraction. This prevents mesh teleporting during montages while keeping montage animations visible.
steps.verification: Root Motion Mode = No Root Motion Extraction

steps.detailed_instructions: Press F7 to compile. Verify green checkmark. Press Ctrl+S to save.

steps.description: Fix AM_ComboAttack montage — root motion and slot
steps.detailed_instructions: Open AM_ComboAttack from Content Browser. In Details: Enable Root Motion Translation = FALSE, Enable Root Motion Rotation = FALSE, Force Root Lock = TRUE. Verify the Slot Track at bottom shows DefaultGroup.DefaultSlot. If wrong, right-click slot track to change. Preview the animation — skeleton should punch. Save Ctrl+S.
steps.verification: Root motion off, force root lock on, slot = DefaultSlot, preview shows punch

steps.description: Fix AM_DodgeRoll montage — root motion and slot
steps.detailed_instructions: Open AM_DodgeRoll. Details: Enable Root Motion Translation = FALSE, Enable Root Motion Rotation = FALSE, Force Root Lock = TRUE. Slot = DefaultGroup.DefaultSlot. Save.
steps.verification: Root motion off, force root lock on, correct slot

steps.detailed_instructions: Open AM_Slide then AM_VaultMantle. For each: Enable Root Motion Translation = FALSE, Enable Root Motion Rotation = FALSE, Force Root Lock = TRUE. Slot = DefaultGroup.DefaultSlot. Save each.
Open BP_SWCharacter. Click Mesh component in Components panel. In Details find Animation > Anim Class. Set to ABP_SW_MasterTemplate. Compile BP with F7. Save Ctrl+S.
steps.verification: Mesh Anim Class = ABP_SW_MasterTemplate, compiled green

steps.description: PIE TEST 1 — Locomotion and montage visibility
steps.detailed_instructions: Press Alt+P. Test: 1) Idle = animated no T-pose. 2) WASD = walk/run blend. 3) Left click = punch montage VISIBLE on mesh. 4) Dodge = roll visible. If montage still invisible, open console (backtick) type ShowDebug Animation to see slot weights. Escape to stop.
steps.verification: Character moves and montages play visually

steps.description: Run bionics_wire_vertical_slice.py for DataAssets and config
steps.detailed_instructions: Open Output Log (Window > Developer Tools > Output Log). In the command bar at bottom, type: py import unreal; exec(open(unreal.Paths.project_content_dir()+'Python/bionics_wire_vertical_slice.py').read()) and press Enter. The leading `py` routes the line to UE5's Python interpreter. This creates all DataAssets, registers Asset Manager, configures GameMode, verifies character BP. Watch the log for OK/FAIL messages.
steps.verification: Output Log shows BIONICS phases completing with OK messages

steps.description: Run animbp_doctor.py for full animation verification
steps.detailed_instructions: In Output Log command bar type: py import unreal; exec(open(unreal.Paths.project_content_dir()+'Python/animbp_doctor.py').read()) and press Enter. The leading `py` routes the line to UE5's Python interpreter. Watch for 7 phases of verification. All should show OK.
Open BP_EXOGameMode from Content Browser. Click Class Defaults. Verify: Default Pawn Class = BP_SWCharacter. Verify Default Biome is set to DA_Biome_Forest. Compile and save.

Open the EXO_001 level from Content Browser (/Game/EXO_001). In the World Outliner, search for PlayerStart. There should be at least one. If none exists, drag a PlayerStart from Place Actors panel into the level. Save the level.
steps.verification: At least one PlayerStart exists in EXO_001

steps.detailed_instructions: Open your UE5 project's Config/DefaultEngine.ini file in a text editor (the project folder is the one containing your .uproject file). Search for GameDefaultMap. It should say /Game/EXO_001. Search for GlobalDefaultGameMode. It should say /Game/BP_EXOGameMode. If these are wrong, fix them.
steps.verification: DefaultEngine.ini points to EXO_001 map and BP_EXOGameMode

steps.detailed_instructions: Press Alt+P for PIE. Full test checklist: 1) Character spawns on terrain (not falling). 2) Terrain is connected (no gaps). 3) Warehouses have flat ground. 4) Walk/run blends. 5) Jump works. 6) Punch montage visible. 7) Dodge montage visible. 8) Trees/grass around but not through buildings. 9) Interior lights on in warehouses. 10) No crashes for 60 seconds of play.
steps.verification: All 10 checks pass — demo is playable

prerequisites: UE5 Editor open with Sworder721 project
All C++ compiled (GAS, terrain, movement, combat)
warnings: Do not modify terrain or EXO procedural generation code
